title: get_labs_tests_authentication_and_response_validation
description: Verify that GET /labs/tests/ endpoint requires valid authentication and returns a 200 status with a response containing success boolean, data array, and total_count integer on successful request.

title: post_labs_tests_create_new_lab_test_with_valid_data
description: Test POST /labs/tests/ endpoint with valid authentication and valid request body to create a new lab test, expecting a 201 response with success true, created test data object, and a confirmation message.

title: put_labs_tests_update_existing_lab_test
description: Validate PUT /labs/tests/<test_id>/ endpoint with valid authentication and valid update data, ensuring it returns 200 status with success true, updated test data, and a message.

title: delete_labs_tests_delete_existing_lab_test
description: Check DELETE /labs/tests/<test_id>/ endpoint requires authentication and successfully deletes the specified lab test, returning 200 status with success true and a confirmation message.
